changelog: Major Version 3.0.0.5 Release with complete Windows platform compatibility & zero runtime errors.
Added built-in REST API Server (FastAPI) for automated video clipping via HTTP endpoints.
Added MinIO Cloud Storage Auto-Upload support for seamless post-processing distribution.
Migrated packaging architecture to stable PyInstaller one-folder bundle with bundled Qt plugins.
Integrated native vendor binaries (ffmpeg, ffprobe, yt-dlp) and startup health check self-healing.
